overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 follows a character walking through Night City at night. The journey transitions from covered walkways through neon-lit intersections and narrow alleys, showcasing holographic billboards, red structural elements, and atmospheric steam vents characteristic of the cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with geometric ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath a geometric red beam ceiling

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction through the covered walkway

entered.detail: geometric pattern of red structural beams forming a distinctive ceiling
red neon sign with white lettering mounted on the right wall
large cylindrical pillars supporting the overhead structure
yellow painted stairs visible in the distance on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway characterized by a striking geometric ceiling with red structural beams. A red neon 'Fuyutsuki' sign is visible on the right wall, and the path is lined with concrete support pillars. Another pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction as the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered walkway into open urban intersection with massive holographic billboards
crossing the wide intersection toward the towering glass buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the expansive intersection while heading toward the illuminated skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: car driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: massive holographic billboard displaying 'El Guapo' on the side of a skyscraper
tall futuristic towers covered in illuminated windows and advertisements
wide asphalt intersection with painted crosswalk lines
large rectangular digital billboard mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The 'El Guapo' billboard dominates the left side of the view. The character crosses the asphalt intersection as a car passes in the background, moving toward the brightly lit urban center.

events.description: enters covered sidewalk area alongside the street with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing yellow and black construction barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking in the opposite direction passing by the camera

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing cover over the sidewalk
yellow and black striped barriers lining the right side of the path
metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
modern building with reflective glass windows and vertical lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a covered sidewalk running alongside the street, protected by a building overhang. Yellow and black construction barriers line the right side while a metal railing separates the walkway from the road on the left. A pedestrian in a blue jacket walks past in the opposite direction as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with steam vents

events.description: turns into narrow alleyway illuminated by dense red neon signage
passing through atmospheric steam rising from ground vents

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley passing steam vents and red neon signs

entered.detail: bright red neon signage illuminating the right side of the narrow alley
ground vents releasing atmospheric steam that catches the neon light
tight concrete walls creating an enclosed corridor
large industrial dumpster positioned against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alleyway bathed in red neon light from signage on the right. Atmospheric steam rises from ground vents, creating a hazy cyberpunk atmosphere. The tight space is flanked by concrete walls and features an industrial dumpster on the left as the character progresses deeper into the alley.

events.description: emerges from narrow alley into wider street with pedestrian overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the pedestrian overpass while walking along the city street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the overpass stairs

entered.detail: elevated walkway crossing over the street with stairs on the right
wide digital billboard spanning across the street displaying advertisements
staircase leading up to the pedestrian bridge on the right side
tall buildings with multiple illuminated signs and storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wider urban street, approaching a pedestrian overpass that spans the road ahead. A large horizontal billboard displays advertisements above the street, while stairs on the right lead up to the overpass. Another pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction toward the crossing structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban environment that transitions from structured walkways into a vast neon intersection and finally into a narrow, atmospheric alley. It begins behind a character walking through a covered pedestrian path defined by red geometric ceiling beams and a glowing Fuyutsuki sign. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a massive intersection dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and a large El Guapo holographic billboard. The camera then follows the character onto a covered sidewalk lined with yellow construction barriers before turning into a tight, red-lit alleyway filled with rising steam and industrial debris. Finally, the view expands once more as the character exits the alley and approaches a wide urban street featuring a pedestrian overpass and a large horizontal advertisement.
